command: echo '=== 1. Vector server files ===' && ls -la /opt/claude-code/workspace/agentic-rag/.claude/mcp/vector-server/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'NOT FOUND at workspace path' && echo '=== 2. node_modules ===' && ls /opt/claude-code/workspace/agentic-rag/.claude/mcp/vector-server/node_modules/.package-lock.json 2>/dev/null && echo 'node_modules OK' || echo 'node_modules MISSING' && echo '=== 3. claude.env keys ===' && grep -oP '^[A-Z_]+(?==)' /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env 2>/dev/null && echo '=== 4. PG test ===' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "SELECT extname, extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='vector';" 2>&1 && echo '=== 5. Quick vector server test ===' && cd /opt/claude-code/workspace/agentic-rag/.claude/mcp/vector-server 2>/dev/null && timeout 5 node -e "import('./db.js').then(m => { const db = new m.VectorDB({pgUrl: process.env.PG_URL || 'postgresql://n8n:$(grep PG_URL /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env | cut -d= -f2- | sed "s|postgresql://n8n:||;s|@.*||"  )@127.0.0.1:5432/vector_memory', openaiKey: 'test'}); db.health().then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.log('health error:', e.message); process.exit(0); }); })" 2>&1 || echo 'Server test skipped'
intent: full vector server diagnostics on VPS
